details.test: Task 1: Add cheapest indoor New York event to quote list
Task 2: Start booking for event with availability and contact details
Task 3: Compare two activities and save better option to wishlist
Task 4: Build full-day event plan with three activities
Task 5: Request quote for large-group workshop-equivalent event

Task 8: Find team building tips article for new managers and subscribe
Task 9: Use pricing calculator and save estimate under 7000
